name: Kill Tiger
short_description: As the excellent killer,you finally eliminate the last hidden danger of Your Majesty. What you face is not the supreme glory,but the cold shackles. What conspiracy is there behind all this! ? Passing through layers of dense fogs, and getting across the gears layer upon layer, You will search the cruel truth!
detailed_description:
'Kill Tiger' applies the traditional 2D scroll game,
you will place yourself in the scenes which are full of oriental charms,
And dodge various dangerous gears through the agile operation.
And there are also the enemies of all forms and boss certainly,
only by striking them down can you trace out the origin of truth.
